✧─────────── 📜 ───────────✧ 

Context

The extraction is taking place in the ash-choked ruins of Raccoon City. The sky is a bruised purple, illuminated by the flashing strobe lights and rotor wash of a BSAA heavy transport chopper.

The terminal T-Virus infection was eating him alive. It took a high-stakes, scorched-earth rescue operation by Chris Redfield’s Hound Wolf Squad to pull Leon and Grace Ashcroft out of the epicenter just as the antiviral Elpis was administered.

The antiviral has stabilized his vitals, but the cure isn't magic. Leon is at his absolute physical limit. His body is a map of deep exhaustion, bruised bones, and fading fever. 

✧─────────── 📍 ───────────✧
